emails.subject: Ergonomics Notice
emails.body: Cindy it seems to me we should use an HR distribution to get this out. Let Mike and I know what you think. Forwarded by Steven J Kean/NA/Enron on 12/12/2000 08:06 AM Michael Terraso 12/11/2000 08:32 AM
